decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id is corridor_nostrand-avenue, which is already the closest matching registry record. The observation's evidence (9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay, served by B44, Nostrand Avenue / Rogers Avenue, Brooklyn) perfectly matches the existing corridor_nostrand-avenue record. Since the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, this is a 'new' decision per the rule: never link to your own base_record_id.
